hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '"file_path".*firmware/.*\.rs'; then cd /repo/firmware && cargo clippy 2>&1 | head -30 || true; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '"file_path".*Cargo\.lock'; then echo 'Cargo.lock should not be manually edited'; exit 2; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '"file_path".*crates/gbp-(core|agent|comms|map)/'; then if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(use std::|extern crate std|use alloc::|extern crate alloc)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: std/alloc import in no_std core crate'; exit 2; fi; fi
